title: Build Reports and Dashboards Management Page
story: As a Salesforce administrator, I want a dedicated page to browse, filter, organize, and manage all reports and dashboards with taxonomy tagging, so that I can govern analytics assets efficiently.
description:
A new Reports & Dashboards management page that consolidates all Salesforce reports and dashboards into a single, filterable, categorizable interface.

### Grouping
- Salesforce Folders
- Line of Business
- Categories/Topics

### Filtering
- Type (Dashboard/Report)
- Line of Business (multi-select)
- Topic (multi-select)
- Metrics (multi-select)
- Date Created
- Date Last Modified
- Reports Created by Current User

### Sidebar Actions
- **Analytics Status** dropdown: Production, Deprecate, In-Progress
- **Notes** input field
- **Topic/LOB Selection**: Tag reports and dashboards with taxonomy categories (same as metrics)
- **Details and Analytics tabs** in the sidebar

### Features Implemented
- Report name as clickable link
- Off-canvas sidebar with Details and Analytics tabs
- Notes section for report-level annotations
- Taxonomy assignment (add/remove) for reports and dashboards
- Category navigation dropdown in sidebar
- Analytics Status dropdown
- Next/previous navigation with keyboard arrow support
- Refresh button to sync from Salesforce
- Five toggle filters
- Separate sections for Reports and Dashboards on the same page

### Data Model
- New `ReportTaxonomies` model to hold assigned taxonomies per report
acceptance_criteria: Dedicated Reports & Dashboards page is accessible from the main navigation
Reports and Dashboards are listed in separate sections on the same page
Multi-select filters work for Type, LOB, Topic, Metrics, Date Created, Date Last Modified
Off-canvas sidebar opens with Details and Analytics tabs on report click
Users can assign/remove taxonomy values to reports and dashboards
Analytics Status dropdown allows setting Production, Deprecate, or In-Progress
Notes field allows adding annotations per report
Next/previous navigation works via icons and keyboard arrows
Refresh button syncs report data from Salesforce
ux_changes: New Reports & Dashboards page with dual-section layout (reports and dashboards), multi-select filters, off-canvas sidebar with Details/Analytics tabs, taxonomy tagging, Analytics Status dropdown, notes, and keyboard navigation.
middleware_changes: New controllers and services for report/dashboard listing, filtering, taxonomy assignment, analytics status management, notes saving, and Salesforce data refresh.
data_model_changes: New ReportTaxonomies model to store taxonomy assignments (LOB, Topic) for individual reports and dashboards.
api_changes: New endpoints for report/dashboard CRUD, taxonomy assignment, analytics status update, notes update, and Salesforce data refresh.
implementation_notes: This was a large feature built incrementally. Reports section was built first, then dashboards were added as a separate section below. The metrics filter relationship required clarification on how reports relate to metrics on this page (vs. on the metrics glossary page). Five filters were added with a toggle icon to show/hide the filter panel.
comment_summary: Developer built the feature incrementally, starting with reports then adding dashboards. Multiple progress updates with screenshots shared. Developer asked about the metrics-reports relationship on this page. Filters, taxonomy assignment, sidebar navigation, and refresh from Salesforce were all implemented and reviewed.
